← All tools

Flag Analyzer

Drop in any flag image and see what it's made of — its dominant colors and how much of the flag each one covers, its aspect ratio, whether it's mirror- or rotation-symmetric, and how it scores against NAVA's "Good Flag, Bad Flag" principles. Everything runs in your browser.

🏳️

Drag & drop a flag image here, or

Flag

Proportions width : height

Simplified ratio
—
width : height
Decimal
—
—
Closest flag ratio
—
—

Symmetry how the flag reads when flipped

Higher = the flag looks the same after that flip. High left–right symmetry means the flag reads the same from either side (front and back look alike).

Dominant colors

NAVA critique Good Flag, Bad Flag

Principles from the North American Vexillological Association. Color count and simplicity are measured from the image; symbolism, lettering and distinctiveness are reminders — a picture can't fully judge those.

Make your own

Like what you see, or want to fix a warning? Rebuild it from scratch in the companion tool.

🛠 Open Flag Designer
Nothing you upload leaves your browser · a max tool
